title: cheilanthes marlothii
intro: Cheilanthes marlothii, also known as the "Mountain fern" or "Rooi-ivoor fern" in Afrikaans, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cheilanthes marlothii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be administered orally to harness its therapeutic properties.
